programme.title: Always Amore
programme.desc: Struggling to keep her late husband's Italian restaurant afloat, a woman agrees to work with a professional consultant to see if they can turn things around. At first, she's resistant, but as they get closer, she realizes not all change is bad.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While on a wheelchair, Sophia manipulates a nurse; Blanche is a stage grandmother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche discovers she has exceeded the legal number of tenants she is allowed; Dorothy discovers Sophia's first marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Hoping for a reconciliation, Stan buys a date with Dorothy at a charity auction.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The ladies must take the stage in the school play when Dorothy's first-graders come down with the measles.

programme.desc: An old photo shows Blanche with Charlie; Sophia has a hearing test.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean comes to Reba for advice when she suspects that Brock is cheating on her; Kyra's boyfriend breaks her heart.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Tensions between Reba and Barbra Jean lead to a bar brawl when they have a girls' night out to celebrate Cheyenne's birthday.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean enlists Reba's help to break the news to Brock that she wants another baby, but the situation backfires when Barbra Jean catches Reba and Brock in a romantic embrace.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba is put in the middle of Brock and Barbara Jean's marital troubles when Barbara Jean considers a divorce and claims Reba is her inspiration.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Kyra repeatedly cancels plans with the family, Reba finds out that Barbra Jean is monopolizing all of her time.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean convinces unenthusiastic Reba to go clubbing; Van explains the birds and the bees to Jake.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: As he tries to woo a powerful sports agent who also happens to be gay, Van accidentally "outs" his mother-in-law.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Cheyenne throw a surprise party in honor of Van's new arena football contract, but the real surprise comes when Van announces he has been traded to a team in Denver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose thinks her late husband is using inanimate objects to communicate with her from beyond the grave.

programme.desc: Blanche's date still lives with his mother; Stan wants Dorothy and Sophia to attend therapy with him.

programme.desc: Sophia predicts a hurricane's path; Blanche and Rose participate in a telethon; Dorothy joins Stan in therapy.

programme.desc: Dr. Halperin counsels Dorothy at home; a police evacuation forces everyone to take refuge at the TV station.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: After Rory writes a scathing review of the Yale ballet, she becomes the target of the vindictive lead ballerina (Katherine Brunk).

programme.desc: Richard and Emily invite Lorelai and Rory to their fancy tailgate party at the Harvard-Yale game; Rory is shocked to see Paris and a distinguished professor (Michael York) kissing.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Shocked Lorelai learns Jason (Chris Eigeman) attended a charity event with someone else; Paris sneaks out to meet professor Flemming (Michael York), forcing Rory to make excuses for her to the paper's editor (Danny Strong).

programme.title: The Heiress and the Handyman
programme.desc: After losing her fortune, an heiress moves to a rural farm where she mistakes her handsome neighbor for the handyman. To live up to her family's legacy, he helps her compete.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: A Costa Rican Wedding
programme.desc: A clumsy maid of honor gets help from her handsome nemesis when things go awry at her best friend's Costa Rican wedding.

programme.title: To Philly with Love
programme.desc: A teacher and an archivist decode Revolutionary War-era love letters, taking them on a thrilling journey through Philadelphia where they uncover history and discover a love story of their own. Stars Rebecca Dalton, Stephen Huszar.

programme.desc: Dorothy's Saturday night date causes Rose, Blanche and Sophia to recall scandalous evenings from the past.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba confronts Brock and Barbra Jean's therapist when she learns he holds her responsible for most of their marital problems; Cheyenne prepares to console Van on his first visit home but is crushed to find that he loves his life in Denver.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Reba encourages Brock to follow his dream of playing professional golf, Barbra Jean gets upset, fearing it may lead to the end of her marriage.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne's emotions about Van living part-time in Denver boil over when she learns that he lied about having to return to Denver early.

programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean battle over who should host Thanksgiving dinner and feelings get hurt; BJ cooks.

programme.desc: While choking, Sophia has an out-of-body experience; Blanche protests the demolition of the family's plantation.

programme.desc: A soldier returning from the Persian Gulf sweeps Blanche off her feet.

programme.desc: Sophia accidentally comes away with the visiting pope's ring, then refuses to return it.

programme.desc: Sophia seeks a swinging senior through the personals column; Rose can't recall an old beau who comes to visit her.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: Nag Hammadi Is Where They Found the Gnostic Gospels
programme.desc: Car trouble strands Jess in Stars Hollow; Jess walks away from Rory over and over again, then makes a startling confession; at a charity dinner, Emily asks Lorelai and Jason to pretend to be lovey-dovey.

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: A workaholic hospital director is forced to re-examine her rigid lifestyle when a free-wheeling EMS pilot enters her life.

programme.title: The Magic of Lemon Drops
programme.desc: When Lolly's Aunt Gert gives her three magical lemon drops, she gets to experience what her life would have been like if she had made different choices and lived those unfulfilled dreams.

programme.title: Love on the Air
programme.desc: Sonia moves to Chicago to be with her boyfriend and starts a new radio gig. When her relationship ends, she confides in a competing shock jock and the two become rivals. When they are forced to work together, they find they have a lot in common.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Deadly Recipe
programme.desc: Bakery owner Hannah Swensen just can't keep her hands out of the batter when murder stirs things up in Lake Eden, Minn.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
